ta-onboarding-program.title: TA Onboarding Mini-Course
ta-onboarding-program.description: Created a standardized onboarding program that reduced variability across the teaching team, improved instructional consistency, and enabled scalable, repeatable training delivery.

scalable-digital-learning.title: Self-Paced Digital Learning System
scalable-digital-learning.description: Designed and built self-paced digital learning experiences using Canvas LMS and Articulate Storyline 360, enabling scalable online training for approximately 500 learners per semester.

k12-mandarin-curriculum.title: Global Mandarin Framework
k12-mandarin-curriculum.description: Designed semester-based Mandarin curricula grounded in second language acquisition theory for English-speaking learners, supporting ~100 students with iterative, outcomes-based design.

corporate-training-system.title: Corporate Authority System
corporate-training-system.description: Designed internal employee training materials to standardize social media operations and content practices at China Telecom Americas, recognized as best internal reference across the team.

instructor-led-seminars.title: The LXD Playbook
instructor-led-seminars.description: Facilitated instructor-led seminars for cohorts of ~80 learners per session, designing interactive discussions and application activities aligned with course objectives.

id-project-lab.title: ID Project Lab
id-project-lab.description: Cohort-based lab focused on hands-on project development aligned with industry learning design standards, applying ID principles to needs analysis, strategy selection, and iterative improvement.

autism-caregiver-training.title: Caregiver Awareness Training
autism-caregiver-training.description: Developed an introductory training module outlining key considerations for interacting with children with autism, supporting basic caregiver awareness and safe practice.
